title: Kerberos SPN failure across apps

servicenow_seed.short_description: [TRAINING] Service account authentication failures across multiple apps
servicenow_seed.description: Several internal apps fail Kerberos authentication after a domain controller maintenance window.

correct_steps: Collect affected app names and service account
Capture klist output or event log errors
rationale: Cross-application Kerberos failure after DC maintenance is identity infrastructure, not a single app issue.
